textByHash.35073cd82e293ac6cb7d000e5a07f7511e53015f: I wish you luck, she did a lot for us.
textByHash.93e56f813a261bef6721b06a60266b835d65a31e: You mean you don't know? The resistance of course! You'd better head down, Elena will fill you in.
textByHash.ab3f55bd90d66003f131a549e8f9b0c2a0cfa5c5: That's good to hear, she helped us a lot.
textByHash.b34d321b584a41fc5c517bff9f08406aad7e7ac8: Yes she was staying here, but slightly over a week ago she was getting ready to go back. However she never managed to leave.
textByHash.f1e3331a5dd62d33162d1158e6030cad940b6f95: Ah yes she said you'd be coming. They're all downstairs. The trapdoor is hidden under the bed.
textByHash.f293bf75a0dae0c0938ffcf5621036586a92d8d1: My daughter Milli was playing near the west wall when she saw some shadowy figures jump out and grab her. Milli is upstairs if you wish to speak to her.
